---
title: 'The Sounds of The Past...'
date: '2020-03-17T04:23:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

Sounds...&nbsp;<div><br></div><div>I've been listening to a lot of material about Podcasting, Audio Equipment, Sound Engineering for Live Church Auditoriums, and most recently, Voiceover work.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Sounds have been on my brain.</div><div><br></div><div>My left ear is ringing, which it does after awhile in the call center world. I need a new profession. But I want to make a big change, not just get another job. So I'm considering what a new self employed career would look like, hence my research.</div><div><br></div><div>Now...&nbsp; looking out my window at the stars, listening to my rain music, the flute takes me back to a class around ten years old where they did a documentary of another culture. I find myself wanting to travel like I did then.</div><div><br></div><div>How much do the things we experience in life shape us without our knowledge?</div><div><br></div><div>How often can a song or a sound take us back to a lesson (good or bad) that we learned?</div><div><br></div><div>What would we be without sounds and the lessons they burn in our souls?</div><div><br></div><div>There stories we tell ourselves and each other are enhanced by sound.</div><div><br></div><div>What sounds have been meaningful to you lately?</div><div><br></div><div>What sounds should you avoid?</div><div><br></div><div>#Selah</div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1584419030110240-0-73aa30115441.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1584419030110240-0-73aa30115441.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div>
